headline: UBS Reaffirms Buy on Elevance Health (ELV) Amid Stronger Industry Trends
summary: Elevance Health, Inc. (NYSE:ELV) is included among the 10 Best Blue Chip Stocks to Buy for Your Retirement Portfolio. On May 22, UBS raised its price recommendation on Elevance Health, Inc.
